definition: This dataset spans 729 days (2022-01-01 to 2023-12-31) with 50,000 transactions and $30,586,355 total revenue. Order sizes have a coefficient of variation of 0.87, meaning per-transaction predictions are naturally noisy. The model is best used at the 'monthly' aggregation grain for executive reporting; per-row predictions remain valid for relative ranking but should not be quoted as absolute order values.
suitable_for: Monthly aggregate revenue forecasting (use the aggregator helper)
Identifying revenue drivers via feature importance
Detecting seasonality and trend changes over time
not_suitable_for: Quoting individual order values precisely (CoV=0.87 → noisy at row level)
Forecasting categories or regions absent from the training data
